query: SELECT COUNT(*) as total, COUNT(CASE WHEN deadline >= NOW() THEN 1 END) as active, COUNT(CASE WHEN deadline < NOW() THEN 1 END) as expired FROM calls_for_entries
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway03.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 4Eu8qizdpHjVgc9.root --database 3ULjLoxa7T9u6LwkiqmLfY --execute SELECT COUNT(*) as total, COUNT(CASE WHEN deadline >= NOW() THEN 1 END) as active, COUNT(CASE WHEN deadline < NOW() THEN 1 END) as expired FROM calls_for_entries
